body_p1: Today I am Sage J Phoenix. Not a revision of who I was — a complete rebirth. I burned the old identity to the ground: the shame, the trauma, the stories that no longer served me. All of it, ash.
body_p2: What rose from it was always real: the discipline of a Mission Crew Commander. The calm of someone who supervised nine people at altitude over hostile territory. The precision of a Chief who managed top secret operations on the ground. The leadership those above and below her always trusted.
body_p3: I am 48 years old. It is my time to build, succeed, and leave a remarkable legacy.
